name: [イッス] Issu | POWERZ
description:
A mysterious man with alleged connections to the international gang, "Heaven's Kings". There's always a party at his mansion, but he doesn't ever seem to be smiling.

[POWERZ] Power exists in everything, and it takes many forms. Some learn it, some are born with it. At times, both. Develop, train, countless paths taken. Countless reasons. And, yet, when presented with a gift—seemingly from the heavens above—what does so much of humanity do? Fight.

MIDAS' TOUCH: Issu is able to manipulate something's value on conceptual level. The two basic uses of this are to enhance or drain the value of something.

With value often based on perspective, this can manifest in many ways, from simply making an object more monetarily valuable, to making his jewelry valuable as weapons, reducing an enemy's weapon's power, inflating (or tearing down) someone's self-worth to make them psychologically vulnerable, and reducing his value as a target to escape from engagements unscathed.

This Power's Godai classification is Void (空).

I was wondering where to set this, but the Yamanashi Prefecture mascot, Hishimaru (菱丸), was cute enough to be the tiebreaker.

I'm not really satisfied. Call it writer's block. EDIT: Aaaaaand he's currently the most popular out of the POWERZ series.

artist is nomifuki

I've noticed that the Godai classification system is confusing—it's meant to be—so here's a little guide.

Godai classification (五大分類) is a system to classify Powers based on the the five elements in Esoteric Japanese Buddhist thought: Earth (地), Water (水), Fire (火), Wind (風) and Void / Aether (空). It has long been criticized as being culturally exclusive and too broad. It is not a ranking of power and strength, but it is often confused for one. Despite this, Powers classified under Void (空) tend to be powerful and rare.

Earth (地): represents the hard, solid objects of Earth. Associated with collectiveness, stability, physicality, and gravity. Resistance to change. Includes healing and often anti-magic / anti-Power abilities. Stone, bones, muscles, and tissue.

Water (水): represents the fluid, flowing, and the formless things in the world. Associated with thought, defensiveness, adaptability, flexibility, suppleness, and magnetism. Water, plants, and blood.

Fire (火): represents the energetic, forceful, moving things in the world. Associated with security, motivation, desire, intention, and an outgoing spirit. Movement, forceful energy, and metabolism.

Wind (風): represents things that grow, expand, and enjoy freedom of movement. Associated with will, elusiveness, evasiveness. Smoke, wind, and the mind, especially with regards to the growth of knowledge and personality; respiration.

Void / Aether (空): represents those things beyond and within our everyday comprehension, particularly those things composed of pure energy before they manifest. Associated with the potential of power, creativity, spontaneity and inventiveness. Now also used to describe Powers that affect concepts or operate conceptually, as well as meta-Powers (Powers that directly affect other Powers). Spirit, thought, creative energy, extrasensory perception, and quintessence.

If you want to collaborate with me on the POWERZ series, and make your own bots for it, message me over Discord (my server is in my bio if you haven't already joined it). I'll give you some expanded lore and tips!
creator: macmaybecheese
